choices.text: 3 takeoffs + landings in last 90 days, same category/class/type. Night: 3 T/L full-stop at night in 90 days. IFR: 6 approaches + holds + course tracking in 6 months. Flight review every 24 months.

questions.explanation: 3 T/L in 90 days + medical + flight review.

choices.text: Need IPC (Instrument Proficiency Check) with CFII or examiner. Cannot regain via self-practice after 12-month lapse. Comprehensive instrument review. Then current to act as IFR PIC again.
